title: Safety & PPE
goal: Talk about safety gear and stay safe on site.

completionCriteria.summary: Finish the quiz with at least 80%.

vocabulary.example: Wear a mask for the dust.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: Sorry. I forgot it. Here it is.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Good. Put on your gloves too.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Yes. Use goggles when you cut.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: And a mask for the dust?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Yes, wear a mask. Where are your boots?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: I have my safety boots on.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Good. Clip your harness. This area is danger.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: I understand. I will be careful.

multipleChoice.prompt: What do you wear to protect your head?
What protects your eyes when you cut?
What do you wear for dust?
multipleChoice.explanation: A mask protects you from dust.

multipleChoice.prompt: What keeps you safe when you work high up?
multipleChoice.explanation: A harness keeps you safe at height.

multipleChoice.prompt: You see a sign that says 'Danger'. What should you do?
multipleChoice.explanation: A danger sign means be careful.

fillBlank.prompt: Wear your ___ on site to protect your head.
Put on your ___ before you touch the steel.
Be ___ near the edge of the roof.

matching.instruction: Match the word to its meaning.
Match the word to its meaning.
